name: TrustClaw PTDS
description: TrustClaw Personal Trusted Data Space HTTP APIs and runtime integration.

dbPath.description: Override PTDS SQLite path (default: state/local_ptds.db under OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR)

agentPacksDir.description: Override business agent pack directory (default: trustclaw/agents)

defaultAgentPack.description: Default agent pack id when OpenClaw agentId is not mapped (default: glp1-eligibility)
